author: Anonymous
title: "Legimus in veteri testamento"
editions: Howard Lesher Schug, Latin Sources of Berceo’s Sacrificio de la Misa (Nashville: George Peabody College for Teachers, 1936), pp. 24–98
remarks: Biblioteca Nacional de España, MS. 298, fols. 34–51v. Based almost entirely on Hildebert. Analogous to c. 7 of Speculum: lecture and prose summary of Hildebert's poem. Indicates that W of Malmesbury was right. But on 48r begins with some additions: on VD and Prefaces. Then begins a new commentary on 49r w/ the vestments then the Mass: drawn from Honorius.
